Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWFUNCIONARIO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWFUNCIONARIOSENHA', Status_SimNao.Nao, 2, &SenhaAutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &PesVenIntExt1 = nullvalue(&PesVenIntExt1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &PesVenIntExt2 = nullvalue(&PesVenIntExt2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &PesVenIntExt3 = nullvalue(&PesVenIntExt3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &PesSts = nullvalue(&PesSts) &IncluirDemitidos = 'N' DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Cadastro Funcionários' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'WWFuncionarioColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'WWFuncionarioColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf PesCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible PesRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible &gridPesFan.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible &gridFucCodNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible &gridPesSetNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible &GridPesTipPessoa.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible &gridPesCidNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible PesDtaAdm.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible PesDtaDem.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible &CpfCnpj.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible &gridPesPrmFon.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount PesCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &userupd = !'' &Acti.Clear() &Acti.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &Acti.AddItem(1, 'Imprimir') &Acti.AddItem(2, 'Salário Funcionário') &Acti.AddItem(3, 'Observações') &Acti.AddItem(4, 'Admitir/Demitir') &Acti.AddItem(5, 'Excluir Pessoa') If (&SenhaAutNiv >= 3 or (PesSenfun.IsEmpty() or PesSenfun.IsNull())) &Acti.AddItem(6, 'Alterar/Criar Senha') Endif If (&SenhaAutNiv < 3 and PesCod = &Context.PesCod) &Acti.AddItem(7, 'Alterar/Criar Senha') Endif &Acti.AddItem(8, 'Funções Autorizadas') &Acti.AddItem(9, 'Log.Alteração') &gridPesFan = iif(PesFan.Length() > 30, Substr(PesFan,1, 30) + '...', PesFan) &gridFucCodNom = FucCodNom &gridPesSetNom = PesSetNom &GridPesTipPessoa = PesIsFun &gridPesCidNom = PesCidUfeCod.Trim() +' / '+ PesCidNom.Trim() If PesTip = 'J' //JURIDICA &CpfCnpj = PesCnpj Else &CpfCnpj = PesCpf EndIF &gridPesPrmFon = PesPrmFon &gridPesCidNom.Link = ViewCidade.Link(EmpCod, PesCidCod, '') PesCod.ColumnClass = iif(PesSts <> Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO, !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn hidden-xs') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ PesRaz.Link = VerCliente.Link('WWFuncionario', EmpCod, PesCod) &userupd.Link = wpPessoa.Link('WWFUNCIONARIO', 'UPD', EmpCod, PesCod) EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'WWFuncionarioColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &Acti.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &Acti = 1 Do 'Do ImprimirCadastro' Case &Acti = 2 Do 'Do Salario' Case &Acti = 3 Do 'Do Observacoes' Case &Acti = 4 Do 'Do Adimitir' Case &Acti = 5 Do 'Do ExcluirCliente' Case &Acti = 6 Do 'Do SenhaAutorizacao1' Case &Acti = 7 Do 'Do SenhaAutorizacao2' Case &Acti = 8 Do 'Do Senhaautorizacao' Case &Acti = 9 Do 'Do LogAlteracao' EndCase &Acti = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event SenhaAutorizacao1_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpSetarSenha_Autorizacao.Create(EmpCod, PesCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event SenhaAutorizacao2_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpAlterarSenha_Autorizacao.Create(EmpCod, PesCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event LogAlteracao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wwLogRegistrosIndividual.Create(&LogErpRegKey, 'PESSOA') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoUserNew' wpPessoa.Link('WWFUNCIONARIO', 'INS', &Context.EmpCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoPequisaFone' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpPesquisaFone.PopUp(&Pescod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAniversariantes' WpAniversarios.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportWWFuncionario.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportWWFuncionario.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesCod", '', !'Código', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesRaz", '', !'Nome Funcionário', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridPesFan", '', !'Fantasia', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridFucCodNom", '', !'Função', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridPesSetNom", '', !'Setor', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&GridPesTipPessoa", '', !'Fun.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridPesCidNom", '', !'UF/Cidade', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesDtaAdm", '', !'Admissão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesDtaDem", '', !'Demissão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&CpfCnpj", '', !'Cpf/Cnpj', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridPesPrmFon", '', !'Fone', True, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'WWFuncionarioColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpf1.Visible = False &PesSetCod1.Visible = False &PesSetNom1.Visible = False &PesVenIntExt1.Visible = False &RatCod1.Visible = False &PesCidCod1.Visible = False &PesCidNom1.Visible = False &PesCidUfeCod1.Visible = False &PesFan1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESSETCOD' &PesSetCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESSETNOM' &PesSetNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESVENINTEXT' &PesVenIntExt1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpf2.Visible = False &PesSetCod2.Visible = False &PesSetNom2.Visible = False &PesVenIntExt2.Visible = False &RatCod2.Visible = False &PesCidCod2.Visible = False &PesCidNom2.Visible = False &PesCidUfeCod2.Visible = False &PesFan2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESSETCOD' &PesSetCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESSETNOM' &PesSetNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESVENINTEXT' &PesVenIntExt2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpf3.Visible = False &PesSetCod3.Visible = False &PesSetNom3.Visible = False &PesVenIntExt3.Visible = False &RatCod3.Visible = False &PesCidCod3.Visible = False &PesCidNom3.Visible = False &PesCidUfeCod3.Visible = False &PesFan3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESSETCOD' &PesSetCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESSETNOM' &PesSetNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESVENINTEXT' &PesVenIntExt3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ImprimirCadastro' RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS005.Link(EmpCod, PesCod) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Salario' FuncionarioSalario.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, PesCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Observacoes' wwPessoaObservacao.Link('WWFUNCIONARIO', EmpCod, PesCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Adimitir' WPRecrutamento.Call('WWFUNCIONARIO', EmpCod,PesCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExcluirCliente' wpExcluirPessoa.Popup(EmpCod, PesCod) Refresh keep /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do SenhaAutorizacao1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ SenhaAutorizacao1_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do SenhaAutorizacao2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ SenhaAutorizacao2_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Senhaautorizacao' RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWFUNCIONARIOSENHA', Status_SimNao.Nao, 2, &AutNiv) if &AutNiv >= 3 wpFuncionarioAutorizacoes.Popup(EmpCod, PesCod) Else msg('Não Autorizado à "WWFUNCIONARIOSENHA"') Endif // FuncionarioSenha.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, PesCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do LogAlteracao' &LogErpRegKey = trim(str(PesCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LogAlteracao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESFUNFILCOD" &PesFunFilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESSTS" &PesSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESISFUN" &PesIsFun.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILTROPESRAZ" &FiltroPesRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESCOD" &PesCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"INCLUIRDEMITIDOS" &IncluirDemitidos.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESSETCOD' &PesSetCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESSETNOM' &PesSetNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESVENINTEXT' &PesVenIntExt1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' &FiltroKey = 'FLT#WWFornecedoresColumnsSelector' &UmZero = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(&FiltroKey) Do CAse Case &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Case &UmZero = '1' &SalvarFiltro = true Otherwise RetornaConfUsuario.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, domConfUsuario.Uconf001_PadraoFiltro, &UmZero) if &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Else &SalvarFiltro = true EndiF EndCase if &SalvarFiltro = true /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESFUNFILCOD", "", not &PesFunFilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesFunFilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESSTS", "", not &PesSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESISFUN", "", not &PesIsFun.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesIsFun.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILTROPESRAZ", "", not &FiltroPesRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &FiltroPesRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESCOD", "", not &PesCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"INCLUIRDEMITIDOS", "", true, 0, &IncluirDemitidos, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndIF EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESSETCOD' AND not &PesSetCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesSetCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESSETNOM' AND not &PesSetNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesSetNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESVENINTEXT' AND not &PesVenIntExt1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesVenIntExt1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' AND not &PesCidCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesCidUfeCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidUfeCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' AND not &PesFan1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesFan1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESSETCOD' AND not &PesSetCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesSetCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESSETNOM' AND not &PesSetNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesSetNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESVENINTEXT' AND not &PesVenIntExt2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesVenIntExt2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDCOD' AND not &PesCidCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesCidUfeCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidUfeCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESFAN' AND not &PesFan2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesFan2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESSETCOD' AND not &PesSetCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesSetCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESSETNOM' AND not &PesSetNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesSetNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESVENINTEXT' AND not &PesVenIntExt3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesVenIntExt3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDCOD' AND not &PesCidCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesCidUfeCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidUfeCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESFAN' AND not &PesFan3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesFan3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Pessoa" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub
